LanguageData.FCP_Faction_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Remnants.des: The Lyons' Pride remnants are a faction of disciplined and technologically advanced warriors, striving to preserve the ideals of their late leader, Elder Lyons. Once a proud and unified chapter, they now operate as a fragmented yet determined group, clinging to their mission of protecting humanity and safeguarding advanced technology. Though their numbers have dwindled, their resolve remains unshaken, and they continue to uph老旧 their code of honor amidst the chaos of the wasteland. Their advanced weaponry, power armor, and tactical expertise make them a formidable force, whether as allies or adversaries.
LanguageData.FCP_Faction_BoS_Lyons_Pride_Remnants.ide: 莱昂斯长老告诉我们，没有同情心的技术是毫无价值的。我们是人民的盾牌，无辜者的保护者，并证明兄弟会不仅仅是文物的收藏家。
